title: Matt Murdock & Karen Page "are pretty much the only other person that the other one has left" in DAREDEVIL: BORN AGAIN Season 2, says Deborah Ann Woll: "There's a dependence."
label: Daredevil :Post_Daredevil:

comments.body: Gonna be tough for the Foggy truthers to spin this one. Stoked Karen is getting a bigger role this season though, Deborah is great.

replies.body:
Im not even sure how you could have even where we left it off. The writers and actors have all addressed the loopholes people think of like Matt not hearing a heartbeat in an ambulance and for some weird reason Vanessa having Bullseye kill 10 other people and not Foggy lol

That said, Elden Henson can return for any number of reasons in Flashbacks. Theres nearly 10 years in universe that we dont see with this cast. And thats exactly what they seem to be doing in this season with his character.

comments.body: Karen and Frank shippers did all that hate campaign towards Matt for nothing 😹✌️ sucks to suck
